title: ranunculus oxyspermus subsp. damascenus
intro: Ranunculus oxyspermus subsp. damascenus, commonly known as the Syrian buttercup or Ranunculus damascenus, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Ranunculus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Ranunculus oxyspermus subsp. damascenus include reducing inflammation and pain, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies to treat a range of health issues.
